definitions.commits_365d: Commit contributions reported by GitHub for the trailing 365 days.
definitions.contributions_365d: GitHub contribution-calendar total plus restricted contribution count for the trailing 365 days.
definitions.estimated_source_lines: Current tracked source-code lines on cloned default branches, excluding common vendor, generated, binary and documentation paths.
definitions.repositories: Currently owned public repositories returned by the GitHub REST API.
definitions.stars: Current stargazer totals summed across owned public repositories.
